choices.text: VFR day: destination + 30 min reserve (FAR 91.151). VFR night: 45 min. IFR: destination + alternate (if required) + 45 min cruise reserve (FAR 91.167). Alternate required when destination forecast marginal.

Density altitude: hot day + high field = thin air = poor takeoff/climb performance. POH charts give true performance at DA. Many GA accidents from underestimating DA. Plan early-morning departures, lighter loads.
